narrative:
Newark 5-A (precinct in Licking County) has 1,102 registered voters, with 45.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 42.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 30.5 percentage points.
